articles.title: Iran’s supreme leader vows to protect nuclear and missile capabilities - Politico
articles.description: In a statement, Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei said the only place Americans belonged in the Persian Gulf is “at the bottom of its waters.”
articles.content:
That shock to oil supplies and prices is putting pressure on Trump, who is floating a new plan to reopen the critical passageway used by the U.S.'s Gulf allies to export their oil and gas.
